public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as military logistics coordinator.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Moves like someone trained to decide quickly once the threshold for action has been crossed. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a military logistics coordinator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of military logistics coordinator in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of military logistics coordinator while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must prepare for violence without letting the surrounding institution look openly unstable. Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of military logistics coordinator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Eryndor Bladewright needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Soreheim Proper.
Eryndor Bladewright can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Soreheim Proper.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Eryndor Bladewright as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence. In Soreheim Proper, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Giant Council, Cloud Giant governance cadres.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes
